# API Checklist: Ingest property tax assessment data

**Purpose**: Validate ingestion API contracts for triggering runs and inspecting status.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/019-ingest-tax-assessments/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Trigger Contract

- [x] CHK-API-001 Endpoint accepts manual or scheduled trigger and assessment year.
- [x] CHK-API-002 Request validation rejects invalid assessment year.

## Status Contract

- [x] CHK-API-003 Status response includes coverage and invalid-rate metrics.
- [x] CHK-API-004 Status response includes run identifiers and timestamps.

## Failure States

- [x] CHK-API-005 Failure responses include actionable error details.
- [x] CHK-API-006 Promotion failures do not present production as updated.
